name: DeutschZ System Manager
p_root_policy: DayZ Tools WorkDrive/Vanilla workspace plus legacy/mixed files; do not delete, move, export, or broad-backup automatically
ready_mods_policy: Build/PBO output only, not GitHub source
backup_policy: Safe backup selected paths only, no /MIR, no /PURGE
lmstudio_policy: optional/experimental; do not auto-backup or export .lmstudio/models
archive_policy: Archive old DZSM BAT/PS1/README/Config/ZIP/rest files from install root to _archive_old_versions, never delete
desktop_shortcut_policy: Protect user shortcut; replace only exact known DZSM auto shortcut names; use custom icons
bugreport_policy: Track errors, solution paths, prevention rules and known issues for future DZSM versions
upload_package_policy: Copy only files needed for ChatGPT analysis into a dedicated folder and create desktop shortcut
icon_style: dark graphite true neon green, unique v040 icon filenames, no red
commit_message: chore(dzsm): add system manager, safety docs, upload package and build wrapper
